---
title: "Rāg Iman kalyāṅ"
subtitle: "*Baṅgari mori murakai*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Manaraṅga &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Ektāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> baṅgari mori murakai jina chuo laṅgaravā  
> kara ke kalāi ḍarana lāgī nibhara ḍara jeṭhānī deta gārī

**Antarā**

> saṅga ke lugāi saba dūra mura musakāya gai  
> kara ke pharaka erī

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Ektāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, **O** (khālī) at beat 3, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 7, **3** at beat 9, and **4** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{N}}$ | D | P | M | $\lb{\mathrm{Gm}}$ | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | R | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R |
| **ba** | **ṅga** | **ri** | **mo** | **ri** | **mu** | **ra** | **ka** | **i** | **ji** | **na** | **chu** |
| S | - | - | - | - | - | G | G | R | $\lb{\mn{\mathrm{N}}\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{SS}}$ | - |
| **o** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **la** | **ṅga** | **ra** | **vā** | **-** | **-** |
| S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | $\mn{\mathrm{D}}$ | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | S | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | R | $\lb{\mn{\mathrm{N}}\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{SS}}$ | S |
| **ka** | **ra** | **ke** | **ka** | **lā** | **i** | **ḍa** | **ra** | **na** | **lā** | **-** | **gī** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | R | G | G | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{M}}$ | R | G | M |
| **ni** | **bha** | **ra** | **ḍa** | **ra** | **je** | **ṭhā** | **nī** | **de** | **ta** | **gā** | **rī** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| G | G | $\lb{\mathrm{MD}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{R}}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **sa** | **ṅga** | **ke** | **-** | **lu** | **gā** | **i** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **ba** |
| $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | $\lb{\mathrm{DP}}$ | P |
| **dū** | **ra** | **mu** | **ra** | **mu** | **sa** | **kā** | **-** | **ya** | **ga** | **i** | **-** |
| G | G | $\lb{\mathrm{MD}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{R}}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **sa** | **ṅga** | **ke** | **-** | **lu** | **gā** | **i** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **ba** |
| $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | $\lb{\mathrm{DP}}$ | P |
| **dū** | **ra** | **mu** | **ra** | **mu** | **sa** | **kā** | **-** | **ya** | **ga** | **i** | **-** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{PM}}$ | D | D | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{NN}}$ | D | P | - | $\lb{\mathrm{PD}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{PP}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{MG}}$ | M |
| **ka** | **ra** | **ke** | **pha** | **-** | **ra** | **ka** | **-** | **e** | **-** | **rī** | **-** |

:::
